description: Professional UX Flows + Data Relationships + Cross-App Activity Feed - Onboarding, settings, OAuth/login, cross-app data relationships, and unified activity timeline that makes all apps feel like one product.
steps: Step 1: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Onboarding/FullOnboardingWizard.tsx - Complete first-run wizard that uses the existing onboarding steps (WelcomeStep, WorkspaceSetupStep, ConnectAppsStep, AIPreferencesStep) plus a new AppTourStep. Wraps them in a multi-step stepper with progress indicator, next/back/skip buttons, spring animations between steps. Responsive (single-column on mobile, centered card on desktop).

Step 2: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/SettingsPanel.tsx - Unified settings page component with sections: Profile (name, email, avatar), Appearance (theme toggle light/dark/system, accent color), Notifications (per-app toggles using @quant/notifications PreferenceService), Privacy (data sharing toggles), Keyboard Shortcuts (display all registered shortcuts from KeyboardShortcutManager). Tab-based navigation, responsive layout.

Step 3: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Auth/LoginPage.tsx - Beautiful login/register page with email+password form, social login buttons (Google, GitHub), 'Sign in with QuantMail' branded option, forgot password link. Gradient background with brand colors. Accessible form with proper labels and error states. Responsive.

Step 4: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Auth/ConsentScreen.tsx - OAuth consent screen component. Shows requesting app name/icon, requested permissions list with descriptions, allow/deny buttons, 'remember this app' checkbox. Clean, trustworthy design.

Step 5: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/CrossAppRelations.tsx - Side panel component that shows related items from other apps. Given a context (email, meeting, doc, file), queries for related: calendar events, drive files, chat messages, contacts. Renders in a collapsible sidebar panel with sections per app. Uses @quant/universal-timeline TimelineAggregator for activity feed.

Step 6: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/ActivityFeed.tsx - Cross-app activity feed component showing unified timeline of events across all apps. Uses TimelineAggregator. Shows: who did what, in which app, when. Filterable by app, type, person. Infinite scroll pattern. Each activity card shows icon, actor, action description, timestamp, and link to the item.
Step 7: Create packages/shared-ui/src/__tests__/onboarding-wizard.test.tsx - Test FullOnboardingWizard: step navigation, skip functionality, completion callback.
Step 8: Create packages/shared-ui/src/__tests__/settings-panel.test.tsx - Test SettingsPanel: tab switching, theme toggle, notification preferences.
Step 9: Create packages/shared-ui/src/__tests__/auth-components.test.tsx - Test LoginPage and ConsentScreen: form validation, submission, accessibility.
Step 10: Create packages/shared-ui/src/__tests__/cross-app-relations.test.tsx - Test CrossAppRelations and ActivityFeed: rendering with data, filtering, empty states.
Step 11: Update packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts to export all new components from this feature.
acceptance_criteria: FullOnboardingWizard renders all steps with navigation, progress indicator, and animations
LoginPage renders accessible form with validation and multiple sign-in options
ConsentScreen shows permissions and allow/deny actions
CrossAppRelations panel shows related items from other apps grouped by type
ActivityFeed shows timeline events with filtering and infinite scroll pattern
All new tests pass via vitest run
TypeScript strict mode compiles without errors
findings: All 6 production components created (FullOnboardingWizard, AppTourStep, SettingsPanel, LoginPage, ConsentScreen, CrossAppRelations, ActivityFeed) plus Auth barrel export. 4 test files added with 62 new tests across onboarding-wizard, settings-panel, auth-components, and cross-app-relations. Required IntersectionObserver mock for jsdom in ActivityFeed tests. Total shared-ui tests: 351 passing. Prettier formatted via pre-commit hook. Typecheck and build both pass.
